claim: Victory-condition era transitions (Post-Calamity, Phased Occupation, Anarchy) are UNKEYED, making the renderer of emergence blind to the game's own endgame-adjacent collision moments.

Articulation emits nothing back into mechanics (chronicle/legend never feeds NPC Renown/memory); a plausible loop exists (npc_behavior Renown/Standing track) with no documented rationale for rejecting it — intent UNDETERMINED.

The propagation spec proves per-tick/per-cascade termination but explicitly not cross-tick convergence, leaving the up/down echo loop able to persist at bounded amplitude for the whole campaign with no determinate settling point.

domain_actions — the module implementing the player's primary strategic decision (Domain Actions) — is doc:null, [ASSUMPTION]-resolver-grade, and the source of 3 of the 8 unpopulated §12.4 down-seams, so the headline player choice may resolve mechanically without ever reaching NPCs/settlements.

The runaway-cascade guard (CASCADE_DEPTH_MAX, EMISSIONS_PER_TICK_MAX) that makes the termination theorem meaningful consists of unbacked integers with no cited canonical_source, homed in a module (engine_clock) whose doc:null grade is itself unresolved.

Three incompatible RNG contracts coexist unreconciled (substrate per-emission seed vs propagation spec single global stream vs conversion strategy's named-draw service); the player-facing "Why?" diagnostic depends on the replay determinism this collision puts in question.

scene.combat_resolved is registered with declared consumers (npc_behavior, faction_layer, articulation) that do not actually list it in their own consumes:, so a lateral/up delivery edge the registry claims is covered is silently unreached.

causes[] simultaneously carries authored provenance (cycle-checked) and runtime re-entrancy parentage (cascade depth reconstruction) with no field distinguishing the two, so replay-based depth reconstruction is ambiguous.

MS is an unowned clock at the victory era-transition gates and world-state era transitions (Post-Calamity/Occupation/Anarchy) are unkeyed, meaning the Key/articulation stream is blind to the game's most consequential world-state shifts.
tracked_ref: module_contracts.yaml victory gap_notes (charter calibration list: 'victory (unowned MS clock)')

claim: The 'per-operation -1 Coherence cap' is asserted in PP-196 and mass_battle §A.10 but never defined, while §3.2 and §A.10's own table cost Structural/War at -2 — the contradiction lets a player pay -1 for any non-FR op via cross-juncture arbitrage, flattening the scale->Coherence tradeoff.

The Μ-γ/М-3 'substrate grounds all' trunk — declared universal by T-01 (Systems:ALL) and P-14 — is severed at four major limbs at once: combat_engine_v1, articulation_layer_v30, the faction_behavior_v30 α/β/γ/λ engine math, and 7 of 9 NPC faction priority trees, all carrying zero Thread hooks; the one meta-pattern declared load-bearing everywhere is the most-broken.

The М-5 cross-scale trunk that carries emergent narrative is delivered bottom-up (Domain Echo: capped, timed, enumerated) but not top-down: the §12.4 down-seam targets[] are emitter-unpopulated, scene.combat_resolved's declared consumers do not consume it, and the §3.8 Scene→Mass bonus is never hooked in mass_battle's turn structure — the collision spine is one-directional in practice.

claim: Cross-scale consequence propagates one hop up well (Domain Echo) but never COMPOUNDS: with no collision-marker firer (see collision-engine-has-no-engine) and cross-tick convergence explicitly unproven, the qualitatively-new multi-echo pressure that T-24 promises is never actually computed — the cross-scale clause is delivered at the edge but not at the composition that makes it narrative.

Personal-transformation is the best-served Omega clause (Conviction Scars, §T-23 arc state machines, Rendering Crisis perma -1 TS, §T-22 Belief revision) but is absent in the highest-frequency vector, combat (ED-911), and arc destinations are authored menus rather than emergent trajectories — so transformation is rich only where play is slow.

The player must hold ~27-30 named trackers across scales (Coherence/Fatigue/Face/Concentration/Persuasion/Doubt/Wounds/Momentum/Resources/TS/Certainty/Evidence/Exposure/Disposition/Standing/Renown + Mandate/Stability/Accord/Turmoil/CI/MS-RS/IP/Prosperity-Order-Defense/L-PS/Treasury), far above the corpus's own immersion ceilings, with presentation-layer translation existing for only two scales.
